title: Sorting Activity log by Organization Column
excerpt: The activity log is really helpful. However, we would love to be able to sort the activity log by the status column in the organization that that activity is related to. Such as how many meetings have taken place with or…

posts.author: scoggins77 (Sara Coggins)
posts.cookedHtml: The activity log is really helpful. However, we would love to be able to sort the activity log by the status column in the organization that that activity is related to. Such as how many meetings have taken place with organizations with a specific status. Is that possible in any way?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @scoggins77 and welcome to the community!

This is not possible at the moment so I have turned this into a feature request so that our team is in the loop and other users can vote for it
